first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are nearly identical in substance, awarding the same score and highlighting the same core strengths (extensive experience, TypeScript/Node.js, AI work, testing culture) and weaknesses (no Nest.js, limited JVM stack experience). The differences in wording and the slight shift in which specific concern is emphasized (Kotlin/Java vs. Ember/React history) are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect a substantive change in the assessment of the candidate's qualifications. No reasoning appears to be linked to the demographic change in the name.
